pr.title: Depth Recurrence via Layer Sharing (3 shared blocks → 1/3 params, matched BPB)

output.summary: Weight-sharing cycles three unique blocks over nine virtual layers, cutting unique parameters while letting extra recurrence cycles boost eval without new blocks.
techniques: ALBERT-style shared blocks mapped across virtual layers
Eval-time recurrence cycles reuse the shared blocks
Int8+zlib quantizes only the reduced unique parameters
